courseTitle: Multiplayer, Networked Play, and Live Operations
title: Asynchronous Turn Game
genericDescription: Design play across time; represent pending decisions; make turns meaningful without live presence.
specificDescription: Build an asynchronous hotseat, pass-and-play, play-by-email style, or simulated network turn game. Include saveable match state and a clear turn summary.
gradingRubric: 30 pts asynchronous structure; 20 pts turn quality; 20 pts persistence; 15 pts summary clarity; 15 pts notes.
